rulings.Case Title: JESUS THOMAS SOTO VS. PETER LOUIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Court Order For Inspection Of Premises And Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 07, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF JESUS SOTO's Motion To Compel Compliance With Court Order For Inspection Of Premises And Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. Defendants shall permit Plaintiffs to inspect the subject property starting at 9:30 a.m. on March 9, 2016. Plaintiffs shall personally serve Defendants with this order no later than March 7, 2016 by 8:00 p.m. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,270. = (501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: CAROLINE MERRILL VS. MARIA DASKALAKIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alt Summ Adj
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 07, 2016, line 7. PLAINTIFF CAROLINE MERRILL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative motion for summary adjudication DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burden. No competent evidence provided regarding existence of landlord-tenant relationship of allegedly breached lease clause. No evidence if provided regarding Defendant's failure to comply with the operative Notice. Even if the burned had been shifted, Defendants produce competent evidence creating a triable issue of fact regarding waiver of notice by acceptance of rent from October 2015 to February 2016. = (501/RAW)

rulings.Case Title: MOHAMED A. KARAH VS. IZZUDDIN AHMED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, March 07, 2016, line 9. PLAINTIFF MOHAMED KARAH's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Deem Admissions admitted is DENIED, responses provided. Motion is otherwise GRANTED, responses shall be provided by hand delivery within 5 days on notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted as requested. = (501/RAW)
